monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian FM Araghchi Visits for Ayatollah Khamenei Funeral Preparations
— S4 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 6h ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi states his visit includes preparations for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, signaling succession planning.
US Strikes Iran as Tehran Hits Kuwait and Bahrain, Ceasefire at Risk
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 12h ago. US launches new strikes on Iran after a tanker attack, as Tehran hits Kuwait and Bahrain, raising fears the fragile US-Iran ceasefire could collapse.
IRGC Doubles Down as Iran-US MoU Jeopardized by Hormuz Strikes
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 9m ago. Iran's IRGC intensifies actions after two nights of Strait of Hormuz clashes, threatening the US-Iran MoU and triggering negative market reactions.
